questions: You said the advisor tool result on Day 1 looked like a 'clear win' but then the full golden set told a different story — what made you confident enough to run the full test instead of just shipping it based on that first win?

When you realized the Notion integration was creating hard dependencies, you pivoted to building a connector abstraction instead — how much of that pattern did you already know you'd need, versus discovering it as you hit each OAuth/MCP/Streamlit Cloud wall?

The governance modules existed since Weeks 9–10 but weren't wired into the production pipeline until this week — what was actually blocking you from connecting them earlier, and why did it suddenly become urgent?
